flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Haskell Indian Nations University fell 45% between 2021 and 2024 (32.6% → 17.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Haskell Indian Nations University rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($480 → $600).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Haskell Indian Nations University rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($480 → $600).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Haskell Indian Nations University rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (700 → 978).
